title: Fantasy 2025-26 draft notes — Bijan, Achane breakout, post-round-10 sleepers
html:
Fantasy 2025-26 draft notes — Bijan, Achane breakout, post-round-10 sleepers

Source: 2025-03-09 Apple Note (last modified Aug 25, 2025). Yahir's running NFL fantasy draft prep for the 2025-26 season — pre-launch tier rankings, breakout calls, and sleepers.

TL;DR

  • 1st-round tier: Bijan > Gibbs > Barkley; CD = Nabbers; Jeanty > Jacobs > Achane > J.Taylor; Amon-Ra > Brian Thomas Jr (with Trevor Lawrence/Mac Jones uncertainty) > Puka.
  • Breakout calls: Achane, RJ Harvey, Gibbs, Ricky Pearsall, Calvin Ridley.
  • WR1-upside flag: Achane.
  • Avoid list: DeVonta Smith, Jonathan Taylor, Joe Mixon, Najee Harris.
  • Post-round-10 sleepers: Bill Croskey-Merritt, Ollie Gordon, Damian Pierce / Woody Marks, Dillon Sampson; Harold Fannin Jr, Bhaysul Tuten.
  • TE pick: Loveland (round 4), George Kittle (later).
  • Quote saved: "Chase Brown will be a household name."
  • League fees: $200 app/admin fee, $500 buy-in.

Pattern observed

Yahir's annual fantasy draft prep as a recurring lifecycle event — same diligence-ladder he applies to startups (tier rankings, breakout calls, avoid-lists, sleeper picks). Note last modified Aug 25, 2025 — i.e. right before drafts in late August. Captures 6 months of preparation compressed into one running file.

Confirms the fantasy league is part of the Corvallis crew's ongoing ritual — same crew that does Chelympics and beer ball. The $500 buy-in is real money and signals continued investment in the friendship infrastructure even as Yahir moves to Austin.

Open questions

  • Did any of his picks land? (Achane WR1-upside? Chase Brown household name?)
  • Is "Flanny: Amon Ra" a draft pick from another manager? (Yes — looks like league commentary.)
  • Did Yahir win the league? (Unknown.)
